message:
Command `export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
SOC_CONFIG="$PROJECT_ROOT/config/soc_config.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo ""
echo "Command:"
echo "  nc_chipgen generate \\"
echo "    --soc-config \"$SOC_CONFIG\" \\"
echo "    --out         \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --pdk-root    \"$PDK_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --nc-lib-root \"$NC_LIB_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --skip-synth \\"
echo "    [+ 21 scenario files from scenario_manifest.yaml staged to verification/ post-run]"
echo ""
echo "Launching..."
echo ""

nc_chipgen generate \
    --soc-config "$SOC_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --skip-synth 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="` executed with exit code 0.

function.name: execute_bash

content:
=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ===

Command:
  nc_chipgen generate \
    --soc-config "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/config/soc_config.yaml" \
    --out         "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526" \
    --pdk-root    "/nc/apps/pdk" \
    --nc-lib-root "/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/ip" \
    --skip-synth \
    [+ 21 scenario files from scenario_manifest.yaml staged to verification/ post-run]

Launching...

usage: nc_chipgen [-h] --soc-config SOC_CONFIG --out OUT --pdk-root PDK_ROOT
                  [--nc-lib-root NC_LIB_ROOT] [--socgen-root SOCGEN_ROOT]
                  [--padframe-gen-root PADFRAME_GEN_ROOT]
                  [--skip-synth | --full-synth] [--core-width CORE_WIDTH]
                  [--core-height CORE_HEIGHT] [--aspect-ratio ASPECT_RATIO]
                  [--target-util TARGET_UTIL]
nc_chipgen: error: unrecognized arguments: generate

=== nc_chipgen exited with code: 2 ===

extras.command:
export PATH="$PATH:/home/user/.local/bin"

PROJECT_ROOT="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526"
SOC_CONFIG="$PROJECT_ROOT/config/soc_config.yaml"
PDK_ROOT="/nc/apps/pdk"
NC_LIB_ROOT="$PROJECT_ROOT/ip"

echo "=== Executing nc_chipgen generate ==="
echo ""
echo "Command:"
echo "  nc_chipgen generate \\"
echo "    --soc-config \"$SOC_CONFIG\" \\"
echo "    --out         \"$PROJECT_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --pdk-root    \"$PDK_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --nc-lib-root \"$NC_LIB_ROOT\" \\"
echo "    --skip-synth \\"
echo "    [+ 21 scenario files from scenario_manifest.yaml staged to verification/ post-run]"
echo ""
echo "Launching..."
echo ""

nc_chipgen generate \
    --soc-config "$SOC_CONFIG" \
    --out         "$PROJECT_ROOT" \
    --pdk-root    "$PDK_ROOT" \
    --nc-lib-root "$NC_LIB_ROOT" \
    --skip-synth 2>&1

RETCODE=$?
echo ""
echo "=== nc_chipgen exited with code: $RETCODE ==="
